subcodes.title: Words to black Baha'is and others, spoken on 1912-09-13
subcodes.first_line: If a man has spiritual characteristics, be he white or black, he is near to God. Some have protested to me, asking why I seek to cultivate love between the whites and the blacks.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر انسانی صورت  و مثال رحمانی داشته باشد سیاه یا سفید نزد خدا مقرب است بعضی بمن اعتراض نموده اند
subcodes.subjects: @kindness to and rights of animals, @unity; oneness of humanity, @race unity; racial issues, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @blind imitation [taqlid]
